tasks.subject: Task 1: Add UseBetaChannel to PluginConfiguration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist the user's beta-channel opt-in as a single bool on the existing plugin configuration, defaulting to false.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/PluginConfiguration.cs`
- Modify: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/PluginConfigurationTests.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- UseBetaChannel exists as bool with default false
- XML round-trip preserves the value
- Build succeeds with no new warnings

**Verify:** `dotnet test -c Release --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PluginConfigurationTests"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/PluginConfiguration.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/PluginConfigurationTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~PluginConfigurationTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["UseBetaChannel exists as bool with default false", "XML round-trip preserves the value", "Build succeeds with no new warnings"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement BetaChannelManager pure decision logic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land ComputeNextRepositories and StructurallyEqual as pure static methods on a new BetaChannelManager shell, with the full unit-test matrix passing.

**Files:**
- Create: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/BetaChannelManager.cs`
- Create: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/BetaChannelManagerTests.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ComputeNextRepositories matches the spec algorithm (URL match case-insensitive, append on enable when absent, remove on disable, no-op otherwise; never modifies enabled/name on existing match)
- StructurallyEqual returns true only when arrays have identical Name+Url+Enabled triples in order
- 11 unit tests pass
- Class is partial in preparation for Task 3

**Verify:** `dotnet test -c Release --filter "FullyQualifiedName~BetaChannelManagerTests"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/BetaChannelManager.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/BetaChannelManagerTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~BetaChannelManagerTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ComputeNextRepositories matches spec algorithm", "StructurallyEqual returns true only when Name+Url+Enabled triples match in order", "11 unit tests pass", "Class declared partial"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire BetaChannelManager as IHostedService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Connect the pure logic to the live IServerConfigurationManager. The manager subscribes to Plugin.Instance.ConfigurationChanged in StartAsync, performs an initial sync, and unsubscribes in StopAsync.

**Files:**
- Create: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/BetaChannelManager.HostedService.cs`
- Modify: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/PluginServiceRegistrator.cs`
- Modify: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.csproj` (InternalsVisibleTo if not present)
- Create: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/BetaChannelManagerIntegrationTests.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Implements IHostedService
- StartAsync syncs + subscribes; StopAsync unsubscribes
- SaveConfiguration called only on structural change
- IOException/UnauthorizedAccessException caught and logged at warning level
- Null Plugin.Instance handled gracefully
- 4 integration tests pass
- Registered in PluginServiceRegistrator
- Build clean

**Verify:** `dotnet test -c Release --filter "FullyQualifiedName~BetaChannelManager" && dotnet build -c Release`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Service/BetaChannelManager.HostedService.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/PluginServiceRegistrator.cs", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.csproj", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library.Tests/Service/BetaChannelManagerIntegrationTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test -c Release --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~BetaChannelManager\" && dotnet build -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Implements IHostedService", "StartAsync syncs + subscribes; StopAsync unsubscribes", "SaveConfiguration called only on structural change", "IOException/UnauthorizedAccessException caught and logged", "Null Plugin.Instance handled gracefully", "4 integration tests pass", "Registered in PluginServiceRegistrator", "Build clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add "Updates" section to config UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface the new flag in the General tab as a single labeled checkbox with description text, wired into config.js's load + save paths.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Configuration/Web/config.html`
- Modify: `Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Configuration/Web/config.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Updates section with chkUseBetaChannel checkbox visible in General tab
- Checkbox state loads from config.UseBetaChannel
- Save persists config.UseBetaChannel
- Build clean

**Verify:** `dotnet build -c Release` (manual visual confirmation is part of Task 5)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Configuration/Web/config.html", "Jellyfin.Xtream.Library/Configuration/Web/config.js"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Updates section with chkUseBetaChannel checkbox in General tab", "Checkbox loads from config.UseBetaChannel", "Save persists config.UseBetaChannel", "Build clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Manual verification on dev Jellyfin server
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm end-to-end behaviour on the real server: the checkbox round-trips, Jellyfin's system.xml gains/loses the beta RepositoryInfo entry, and the plugin catalog reflects the change.

**Files:** None (verification only).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Checkbox visible and unchecked by default
- Toggle ON adds RepositoryInfo with beta URL to system.xml
- Restart preserves ON state
- Catalog shows beta versions when ON
- Toggle OFF removes RepositoryInfo from system.xml
- Restart preserves OFF state

**Verify:** Inspect system.xml on the dev server (host bind path in CLAUDE.local.md); check Dashboard → Plugins → Catalog visually.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Checkbox visible and unchecked by default", "Toggle ON adds RepositoryInfo to system.xml", "Restart preserves ON state", "Catalog shows beta versions when ON", "Toggle OFF removes RepositoryInfo", "Restart preserves OFF state"]}
```
